===========================================================================
🎬 YOUTUBE COMMENT MONITOR - DEPLOYMENT REPORT
Channel: Concessa Obvius
Generated: Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 05:00 AM 
===========================================================================

✅ STATUS: ACTIVE
   • Scheduler: macOS LaunchAgent (com.youtube-monitor)
   • Frequency: Every 30 minutes
   • Mode: Demo mode (YouTube API credentials optional)
   • Log: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

📊 CURRENT METRICS
   • Total Comments Processed: 21
   • Auto-Responses Sent: 13
   • Flagged for Review: 2

📁 COMMENT CATEGORIES
   • Praise         4 ( 19.0%)
   • Questions      9 ( 42.9%)
   • Sales          1 (  4.8%)
   • Spam           7 ( 33.3%)

🔍 CATEGORIZATION RULES
   Questions: 'how', 'what', 'cost', 'tools', 'timeline', '?'
   Praise: 'amazing', 'inspiring', 'love', 'thank you', 'brilliant'
   Spam: 'crypto', 'mlm', 'casino', 'buy now', 'dm me'
   Sales: 'partnership', 'sponsor', 'affiliate', 'collaboration'

📝 AUTO-RESPONSE TEMPLATES
   Questions → 'Thanks for asking! Check our resources...'
   Praise → 'Thank you so much! Your support means everything.'
   Spam → [No response, filtered]
   Sales → [Flagged for manual review]

⚙️  CONFIGURATION
   • Workspace: /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace
   • Channel ID: UC326742c_CXvNQ6IcnZ8Jkw
   • LaunchAgent: ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.youtube-monitor.plist
   • Script: .cache/youtube-comment-monitor-v2.py

📋 QUICK COMMANDS
   # View recent logs
   tail -20 ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor.log

   # View all comments (JSON)
   cat ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq '.'

   # Check monitor status
   launchctl list | grep youtube-monitor

   # Stop monitor
   launchctl stop com.youtube-monitor

   # Start monitor
   launchctl start com.youtube-monitor

🔐 NEXT STEPS (Optional)
   The monitor is running in demo mode. To enable real YouTube API:

   1. Go to: https://console.cloud.google.com
   2. Create project 'Concessa YouTube Monitor'
   3. Enable YouTube Data API v3
   4. Create OAuth2 Desktop Credentials
   5. Download JSON and save to: ~/.openclaw/.secrets/youtube-credentials.json
   6. Run: python3 .cache/youtube-comment-monitor-v2.py
   7. Authorize in browser (one-time)

===========================================================================
